home.title: I'm Francisco Campos Diaz

animated.second: I develop blockchain and Web3 apps

home.description: Full Stack Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience. Currently building decentralized platforms at Zubari.io, and founder of WallyPay — a digital remittance platform for Latin America. Skilled in React, Next.js, TypeScript, Solidity, Node.js, AWS, and blockchain technologies.

about.title: About me
about.aboutme: Full Stack Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience building web applications and 2+ years specializing in Web3 and Blockchain. Currently developing decentralized platforms with Solidity smart contracts, multi-chain SDKs, and modern backend/frontend architectures (Express.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Next.js 15/16, React 19). Founder of WallyPay, a digital remittance platform for Latin America. Active open source contributor through OnlyDust, and Sensei at Dev.f where I mentor the next generation of developers. Experienced with AWS cloud infrastructure (ECS, RDS, S3), CI/CD pipelines, and AI-assisted development workflows. Based in Costa Rica, working remotely with international teams.

services.title: Web3 & Blockchain Development
services.description: I design and implement smart contracts (Solidity, Cairo), multi-chain SDKs, and decentralized applications. Experience building ERC-721/ERC-1155 tokens, subscription systems, DeFi tools, and cross-chain integrations across Ethereum, Bitcoin, TON, TRON, Solana, and StarkNet. From architecture to deployment, I deliver secure and production-ready Web3 solutions.

services.title: Full Stack Development
services.description: End-to-end web application development using Next.js, React, TypeScript on the frontend and Node.js, Express.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL on the backend. I build with Clean Architecture principles, deploy to AWS (ECS, RDS, S3) and Vercel, and implement CI/CD pipelines, internationalization (i18n), analytics, and SEO optimization.

services.title: FinTech & Digital Platforms
services.description: I build financial technology products like WallyPay, a digital remittance platform for Latin America. Experience with payment integrations, wallet systems, PWAs, user authentication, and mobile-first design for financial services.

services.title: Mentoring & Teaching
services.description: As a Sensei at Dev.f, I mentor developers through coding bootcamps covering JavaScript, React, Node.js, and Web3 technologies. I lead workshops, code reviews, and community events, helping aspiring engineers build strong technical foundations and real-world project experience.

dataportfolio.title: Zubari.io
dataportfolio.description: Decentralized content subscription and monetization platform. Designed 12+ Solidity smart contracts (ERC-721, ERC-1155), built multi-chain SDK supporting Ethereum, Bitcoin, TON, TRON, and Solana. Full stack with Next.js 15, Express.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, deployed on AWS.

dataportfolio.title: WallyPay
dataportfolio.description: Digital remittance platform for Latin America — 'Remesas con Proposito'. Built as a PWA with Next.js (App Router, Turbopack), React, TypeScript, featuring authentication, digital wallet, and mobile-first design.

dataportfolio.title: Spokn
dataportfolio.description: Blockchain-based knowledge-sharing platform built on Stellar. Community members propose tech talks, vote with TALK tokens, and compensate speakers with USDC via non-custodial escrow through Trustless Work. Developed in collaboration during the BAF class with Nayib.

dataportfolio.title: Mobil3 Hackathon
dataportfolio.description: 4th place in the Payments category at the Mobil3 Hackathon in Mexico. Developed a blockchain payments solution on Monad, competing against top Web3 teams in Latin America.

dataportfolio.title: OnlyDust
dataportfolio.description: Active open source contributor. Maintainer of Revolutionary Farmer Web3 project, managing community and contributing to blockchain projects in the Starknet ecosystem.

dataportfolio.title: ETH Pura Vida Hackathon
dataportfolio.description: Built a decentralized financial tool to facilitate trust access for farmers in Costa Rica using blockchain technology at the ETH Pura Vida hackathon in Costa Rica.

dataportfolio.title: StarkHack Hackathon
dataportfolio.description: Developed Ninja Academy, a learning platform for Starknet and Cairo during the ETHGlobal StarkHack online hackathon.

dataportfolio.title: Elevar Salud
dataportfolio.description: Designed and developed two telemedicine applications — one for patients and one for physicians — enabling communication and collecting critical medical information using React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

dataportfolio.title: Arrenda
dataportfolio.description: Full stack development for a rental and property management platform, building frontend and backend modules using Node.js and Vue.js.

dataportfolio.title: Gamanza
dataportfolio.description: Developed specialized CRM systems for the casino industry, from design to implementation, improving customer interaction and optimizing operations.

dataportfolio.title: Dev.f Sensei
dataportfolio.description: Mentoring aspiring developers through coding bootcamps, teaching JavaScript, React, Node.js, and Web3 technologies through workshops, code reviews, and community events.

contact.description: Get in touch with me for collaboration, consultations, or any inquiries. Whether you need help with Full Stack development, Web3 solutions, or blockchain projects, I'm here to assist. Reach out, and let's discuss how we can work together to bring your ideas to life!
contact.successMessage: SUCCESS! Thank you for your message

meta.title: Francisco Campos Diaz
